          },
          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 2026-03-28 DigEino执行事件底座升级方案"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## 1. 目标与范围"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "- 目标：把 &#96;DigEino&#96; 升级为统一执行观测底座，让所有接入方获得一致的执行事件语义与稳定分发能力。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "- 范围仅限 &#96;DigEino&#96; 库层，不包含平台治理与业务编排能力。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "- 升级原则："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "  - 只做“发生了什么”的标准化，不做“怎么管”的策略决策。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "  - 对现有消费者保持向后兼容（只增不破）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  - 先统一事件模型，再统一分发语义，最后做性能与稳定性加固。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "## 2. DigEino内部目标架构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid"
          },

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        lifecycleEmitter[NodeLifecycleEmitter]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        eventMeta[EventMetadataStandard]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        observerExt[ObserverExtensionPoint]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    end"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },

          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 35,

          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    retryPolicy --\u003e storeSink"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "## 3. 能力清单（仅DigEino）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "### 3.1 必做能力"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "- 统一 &#96;ExecutionEvent&#96; 数据结构，并加入 &#96;schema_version&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "- 统一节点生命周期事件枚举：&#96;started/succeeded/failed/retried/skipped/completed&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "- 统一元数据字段：&#96;execution_id&#96;、&#96;node_id&#96;、&#96;attempt&#96;、&#96;timestamp&#96;、&#96;source&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "- 统一分发模型：&#96;callback&#96;（同步）、&#96;store&#96;（异步）、&#96;webhook&#96;（异步）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "- 增加 observer 扩展点，支持只观测不决策的插件化扩展。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "### 3.2 明确不做"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "- 业务审计留存策略与平台治理规则。"
          }
        ],

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,

            "lineNumber": 48,

          {
            "lineNumber": 49,

          {
            "lineNumber": 50,

          },

            "lineNumber": 51,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    decide --\u003e|reject| rejected[RunRejected]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    decide --\u003e|approve| dispatch[DispatchExecution]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    review --\u003e|no| dispatch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    dispatch --\u003e running[RunRunning]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    running --\u003e events[IngestNodeEvents]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "## 三、Run 状态与 API 口径"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "### Run 状态（建议）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "- &#96;queued -\u003e pending_review -\u003e dispatching -\u003e running -\u003e succeeded|failed|cancelled|rejected&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "- 恢复态：&#96;running -\u003e stale -\u003e requeued&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "### 最小 API（建议）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "- &#96;POST /api/v1/runs&#96;：创建并触发运行（支持 &#96;orchestration_profile&#96;）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "- &#96;GET /api/v1/runs/{run_id}&#96;：查看当前状态与摘要"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "- &#96;GET /api/v1/runs/{run_id}/timeline&#96;：查看节点事件、人工动作、状态跃迁"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "- &#96;POST /api/v1/runs/{run_id}/actions&#96;：&#96;approve|reject|pause|resume|cancel|retry|restart_from_node&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "## 四、关键问答口径（统一对外解释）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "### Q1：是否通过 API 获取每个 agent 运行状态？"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "是。统一通过 Run/Timeline API 提供状态，不依赖各 app 自行实现状态拼接。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "### Q2：app 设置为 &#96;governed&#96; 是否自动进入治理流程与审计？"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "是。&#96;governed&#96; 启用治理状态机、审计记录和可选策略关卡；&#96;default&#96; 保持旧行为。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "### Q3：启用治理/审计后，是否一定在节点中断？"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "不一定。默认是“审计不停流”，仅当命中 Gate Policy 才中断并等待审批/指令。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "## 五、按 App 拦截策略（解决节点字段不一致）"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 104
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 43
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/2026-03-29_DigFlow平台治理Workflow与按App拦截策略方案.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.271279513835907
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "\t\tgo sc.runSinkDispatcher()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) enqueueSinkTask(task sinkTask) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "\tsc.ensureDispatcherLocked()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "\tqueue := sc.sinkQueue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "\ttimer := time.NewTimer(sinkEnqueueTimeout)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "\tdefer timer.Stop()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "\tselect {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366,
            "text": "\tcase queue \u003c- task:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "\t\tsc.updateStats(func(stats *DispatchStats) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "\t\t\tstats.Enqueued++"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "\tcase \u003c-timer.C:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372,
            "text": "\t\t// 队列拥堵时降级为独立 goroutine，优先保证事件不丢。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "\t\tsc.updateStats(func(stats *DispatchStats) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "\t\t\tstats.QueueFallback++"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "\t\tgo sc.executeSinkTask(task)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) runSinkDispatcher() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "\tfor task := range sc.sinkQueue {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "\t\tsc.executeSinkTask(task)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) executeSinkTask(task sinkTask) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "\tfor i := 0; i \u003c= sinkRetryCount; i++ {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388,
            "text": "\t\tvar err error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "\t\tsinkName := \"unknown\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "\t\tif task.store != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "\t\t\tsinkName = \"store\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "\t\t\tif ok := task.store.AddStatus(sc.executionID, task.status); !ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "\t\t\t\terr = fmt.Errorf(\"status store rejected execution_id=%s\", sc.executionID)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "\t\tif task.client != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "\t\t\tsinkName = \"webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "\t\t\terr = task.client.SendStatus(task.ctx, task.status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "\t\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "\t\t\tsc.updateSinkResultStats(sinkName, true)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "\t\tif i \u003c sinkRetryCount {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "\t\t\tsc.updateStats(func(stats *DispatchStats) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tstats.RetryCount++"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "\t\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "\t\t\ttime.Sleep(sinkRetryDelay)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "\t\t\tcontinue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "\t\tsc.updateSinkResultStats(sinkName, false)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) shouldSendToAsyncSinks(status ExecutionStatus) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "\tsampleRate := sc.sampleRate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "\tif status.NormalizeEventType() == EventTypeCompleted || status.NormalizeEventType() == EventTypeFailed {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "\t\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "\tif sampleRate \u003e= 100 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "\t\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "\tif sampleRate \u003c= 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "\t\treturn false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "\thasher := fnv.New32a()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "\t_, _ = hasher.Write([]byte(strings.ToLower(status.DedupeKey())))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "\treturn int(hasher.Sum32()%100) \u003c sampleRate"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) compactStatusByPayloadLimit"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 54,
            "line": 434
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 51,

          }

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) sendStatusAsync(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "\tsc.statusHistory = append(sc.statusHistory, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "\tcallback := sc.statusCallback"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "\tstore := sc.statusStore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "\tclients := sc.webhookClients"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "\t// 1. 优先执行回调（SSE 等），虽然它是同步调用，但在应用端可能已实现异步"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "\tif callback != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "\t\tcallback(status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "\tasyncStatus := status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "\tif !sc.shouldSendToAsyncSinks(asyncStatus) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "\t\tsc.updateStats(func(stats *DispatchStats) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "\t\t\tstats.SampledOut++"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "\t\treturn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "\tvar compacted bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "\tasyncStatus, compacted = sc.compactStatusByPayloadLimit(asyncStatus)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "\tif compacted {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "\t\tsc.updateStats(func(stats *DispatchStats) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "\t\t\tstats.PayloadCompacted++"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "\t// 2. 异步存储状态，避免数据库等慢操作阻塞主流程"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "\tif store != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "\t\tsc.enqueueSinkTask(sinkTask{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "\t\t\tctx:    detachContext(ctx),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "\t\t\tstatus: asyncStatus,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "\t\t\tstore:  store,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "\t// 3. 异步发送 Webhook"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "\tif len(clients) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "\t\tsafeCtx := detachContext(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "\t\tfor _, client := range clients {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "\t\t\tsc.enqueueSinkTask(sinkTask{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tctx:    safeCtx,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tstatus: asyncStatus,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tclient: client,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "\t\t\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "func detachContext(ctx context.Context) context.Context {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "\tif ctx == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "\t\treturn context.Background()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "\treturn context.WithoutCancel(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) ensureDispatcherLocked() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "\tsc.dispatchOnce.Do(func() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "\t\tsc.sinkQueue = make(chan sinkTask, sinkQueueSize)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "\t\tgo sc.runSinkDispatcher()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "\t})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) enqueueSinkTask"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 42,
            "line": 355
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 37,
            "line": 290
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",
        "signatures": {}

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "if collector != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "    // 可选：运行时覆盖策略（优先级高于配置）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "    collector.SetEventPolicy(100, 262144)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "    ctx = webhook.WithStatusCollector(ctx, collector)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "### 步骤 4：在执行流程中上报节点生命周期"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "sc := webhook.GetStatusCollector(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "if sc != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    sc.OnNodeStart(ctx, \"node_1\", \"chat_model\", input)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "// ... 执行节点逻辑 ..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "if sc != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "    sc.OnNodeEnd(ctx, \"node_1\", \"chat_model\", output, execErr)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "### 步骤 5：执行结束时上报完成事件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "sc := webhook.GetStatusCollector(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "if sc != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    sc.OnComplete(ctx, resultMessage, finalErr)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "### 步骤 6：读取分发统计（调试/监控）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "if sc != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "    stats := sc.GetDispatchStats()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "    // stats 包含：Enqueued / RetryCount / StoreFailure / WebhookFailure / SampledOut 等"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "    _ = stats"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "## 事件字段迁移建议"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "### 推荐消费优先级"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "1. 优先使用 &#96;event_type&#96;（统一语义）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "2. 优先使用 &#96;node_id&#96;（统一节点标识）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "3. 使用 &#96;schema_version&#96; 做版本分支"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "4. 保留对 &#96;type&#96;、&#96;node_key&#96; 的兼容读取"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "### 旧新字段映射"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "| 历史字段 | 新字段 | 说明 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "| --- | --- | --- |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "| &#96;type=node_start&#96; | &#96;event_type=started&#96; | 节点开始 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "| &#96;type=node_end,status=success&#96; | &#96;event_type=succeeded&#96; | 节点成功结束 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "| &#96;type=node_end,status=error&#96; | &#96;event_type=failed&#96; | 节点失败 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "| &#96;type=complete,status=success&#96; | &#96;event_type=completed&#96; | 执行完成 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "| &#96;type=complete,status=error&#96; | &#96;event_type=failed&#96; | 执行失败 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "| &#96;node_key&#96; | &#96;node_id&#96; | 节点标识并行输出 |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "## 兼容性说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "- 现有消费者继续读取 &#96;type/node_key&#96; 不会中断。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "- Webhook &#96;Events&#96; 支持新旧事件名混用（如 &#96;[\"complete\",\"error\"]&#96; 或 &#96;[\"completed\",\"failed\"]&#96;）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "- 默认行为不需要强制配置 &#96;Status.Event&#96;，不配置时会使用安全默认值。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "## 验证方式"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "建议按以下顺序验收："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "1. 执行 &#96;go test ./...&#96;，确保单测通过。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "2. 开启一个内存 store + 本地 webhook mock，验证能收到 &#96;started/succeeded/completed&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "3. 将 &#96;SampleRate&#96; 调低（如 &#96;10&#96;），确认终态事件仍稳定送达。"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 218
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 144
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-03-28_DigEino执行事件底座升级与使用说明.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.23142150044441223
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "### 3) 统一入口初始化"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "新增 &#96;webhook.NewConfiguredCollector(...)&#96;，用于统一 HTTP/CLI/批处理三类入口的 collector 装配逻辑，避免每个入口手写装配导致行为不一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "### 4) 事件策略与可观测"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "新增策略能力："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "- &#96;Status.Event.SampleRate&#96;：非终态事件采样率（0-100）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "- &#96;Status.Event.MaxPayloadBytes&#96;：单事件 payload 上限"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "新增运行统计能力："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "- &#96;GetDispatchStats()&#96; 返回分发统计（入队、重试、失败、采样丢弃、压缩次数等）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "## 配置说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "在 &#96;config/config.yaml&#96; 中增加如下配置："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "Status:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "  Webhook:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    Enabled: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    URL: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"] # 兼容旧名；也支持 started/succeeded/failed/completed"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "  Store:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    Type: \"memory\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "  Event:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "    SampleRate: 100            # 非终态事件采样率（0-100），100 表示不采样"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    MaxPayloadBytes: 262144    # 单条状态事件 payload 上限（字节）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "说明："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "- &#96;SampleRate&#96; 只作用于非终态事件；终态事件（&#96;completed&#96;/&#96;failed&#96;）始终发送。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "- &#96;MaxPayloadBytes&#96; 超限时会触发渐进压缩（优先裁剪 DataFlow 明细）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "## 如何使用（详细）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "### 步骤 1：初始化配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "_, err := config.Load(\"config/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "    panic(err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "### 步骤 2：创建状态存储（可选）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "baseStore := status.GetDefaultStore()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "store := status.NewStatusStoreAdapter(baseStore)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "### 步骤 3：统一创建 Collector（推荐）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "collector := webhook.NewConfiguredCollector("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "    executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    \"YourAppName\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "    requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "    store, // 可为 nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    func(s webhook.ExecutionStatus) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "        // SSE/WS 推送等实时回调（可选）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "    func() string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "        // 仅在未配置 URL 时作为默认值提供（可选）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "        return webhook.BuildDefaultWebhookURL(\"http\", \"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "if collector != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "    // 可选：运行时覆盖策略（优先级高于配置）"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 146
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 72
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-03-28_DigEino执行事件底座升级与使用说明.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2313345968723297
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "\tvar model MySQLExecutionModel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "\tif err := s.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).First(\u0026model).Error; err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026ExecutionRecord{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: model.ExecutionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     model.AppName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   model.RequestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:   model.StartTime,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "\t\tEndTime:     model.EndTime,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      model.Status,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "\t\tError:       model.Error,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "\t}, true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "\tvar dataJson, controlJson string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "\tif status.DataFlow != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "\t\tb, _ := json.Marshal(status.DataFlow)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "\t\tdataJson = string(b)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "\tif status.ControlFlow != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "\t\tb, _ := json.Marshal(status.ControlFlow)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "\t\tcontrolJson = string(b)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "\tstatusModel := \u0026MySQLExecutionStatusModel{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID:  executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "\t\tType:         status.Type,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "\t\tTimestampMs:  status.Timestamp,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "\t\tNodeKey:      status.NodeKey,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "\t\tNodeType:     status.NodeType,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:       status.Status,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\t\tError:        status.Error,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:      status.AppName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:    status.RequestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "\t\tDataFlowJSON: dataJson,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "\t\tControlJSON:  controlJson,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.statusTable).Create(statusModel)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "\tif isTerminalStatus(status) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "\t\tupdate := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"status\":   \"completed\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\t\t\t\"end_time\": time.Now(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\t\tif isFailedStatus(status) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "\t\t\tupdate[\"status\"] = \"failed\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "\t\t\tupdate[\"error\"] = status.Error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "\t\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).Updates(update)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) SetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "\tupdate := map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "\t\t\"result_role\":    result.Role,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "\t\t\"result_content\": result.Content,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).Updates(update)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) ListExecutions(page, pageSize int)"
          }
        ],

          }

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\t\"fmt\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"sync\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"time\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\t\"gorm.io/driver/mysql\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\t\"gorm.io/gorm\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "// StatusStore 状态存储接口"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "type StatusStore interface {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tCreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tGetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\tAddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\tSetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\tListExecutions(page, pageSize int) ([]*ExecutionRecord, int)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "// ExecutionRecord 执行记录"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "type ExecutionRecord struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\tExecutionID   string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\tAppName       string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\tRequestID     string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\tStartTime     time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\tEndTime       *time.Time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tStatus        string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tStatusHistory []webhook.ExecutionStatus"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tResult        *webhook.Message"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\tError         string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\tmu            sync.RWMutex"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "// memoryStatusStore 内存实现"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "type memoryStatusStore struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\tmu         sync.RWMutex"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\texecutions map[string]*ExecutionRecord"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\tmaxRecords int"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "func NewMemoryStatusStore(maxRecords int) StatusStore {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026memoryStatusStore{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t\texecutions: make(map[string]*ExecutionRecord),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\t\tmaxRecords: maxRecords,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\ts.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\trecord := \u0026ExecutionRecord{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID:   executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:       appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:     requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:     time.Now(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:        \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t\tStatusHistory: make([]webhook.ExecutionStatus, 0),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\ts.executions[executionID] = record"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\treturn record"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\ts.mu.RLock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\trecord, exists := s.executions[executionID]"

          {

            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string,"
          }
        ],
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 2026-03-29 DigFlow 平台治理 Workflow 与按 App 拦截策略方案"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## 背景"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "基于近期对 &#96;edict&#96; / &#96;paperclip&#96; / &#96;DigFlow&#96; 的对照讨论，目标是明确："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "- 是否可在不影响业务 app 的前提下增加平台治理层；"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "- 如何通过 API 获取每个 agent 运行状态；"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- &#96;governed&#96; 模式与审计/拦截关系；"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- 不同 app 节点字段不一致时，拦截策略如何配置与落地路径。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "## 核心结论"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "1. 可以在 DigFlow 现有业务 app 之上增加治理外层（Governance Overlay）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "2. 通过统一 Run/Timeline API 获取运行状态，不要求 app 自行拼装状态。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "3. &#96;governed&#96; 启用后进入治理流程与审计链路；&#96;default&#96; 保持原链路兼容。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "4. 审计默认旁路记录，不强制中断；只有命中 Gate 策略才会阻塞。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "5. 拦截策略应支持按 app 单独配置，采用“全局默认 + app 覆盖 + 请求覆盖”三层优先级。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "## 一、治理分层建议"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "### 1) DigEino（执行事件底座）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "- 负责“发生了什么”：&#96;execution_id&#96;、节点生命周期事件、事件分发。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "- 提供标准化事件，不承载租户治理、审批预算、运营面板等平台语义。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "### 2) DigFlow（治理与控制面）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "- 负责“该怎么管”：Run 状态机、策略评估、审计事件、人工干预、恢复语义。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "- 对 app 暴露统一治理 API 和运行观测 API。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "### 3) App 层（业务）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "- 仅关注业务流程与领域模型。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "- 不重复实现状态机治理、审计聚合、干预控制等平台能力。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "## 二、平台治理 Workflow（低侵入）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "flowchart LR"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    client[ClientOrScheduler] --\u003e runApi[RunGateway]"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 45
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/2026-03-29_DigFlow平台治理Workflow与按App拦截策略方案.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2168111950159073
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "- 业务审计留存策略与平台治理规则。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "## 4. 升级路线图（DigEino专用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "### 阶段A：事件模型标准化（1-2周）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "- 输出：统一事件 schema 与版本兼容约定。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- 关键动作："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  - 新增 &#96;ExecutionEvent&#96; 与 &#96;schema_version&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "  - 固化字段字典与事件枚举，明确触发时机。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  - 保留旧接口，提供兼容包装层。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- 验收：旧消费者零改动可运行；新消费者可按统一 schema 解析。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "### 阶段B：采集与分发统一化（1-2周）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "- 输出：统一生命周期采集与 sink 分发语义。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "- 关键动作："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  - 统一节点事件发射入口，保证 HTTP/CLI/批处理入口语义一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "  - 打通 &#96;callback/store/webhook&#96; 分发链路，统一错误处理与重试行为。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "  - 增加事件去重键建议（如 &#96;execution_id + node_id + attempt + event_type&#96;）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "- 验收：同一执行在三类 sink 的事件口径一致，异常情况下不丢关键事件。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "### 阶段C：稳定性与发布加固（1-2周）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "- 输出：可对外发布的稳定版本与迁移指南。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "- 关键动作："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "  - 加入 payload 限制、采样与脱敏策略。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "  - 增加回归测试：向后兼容、事件顺序、重复投递、失败重试。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "  - 发布迁移文档（旧字段到新 schema 的映射表）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "- 验收：性能与兼容回归通过；有明确升级说明与回滚方案。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "## 5. 验收标准（最终）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "- 事件语义一致：各入口触发的生命周期事件名称与时机一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "- 兼容稳定：旧消费者无需改造即可继续消费。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "- 分发可靠：sink 故障可重试、可观测、可降级。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "- 可扩展：新增事件字段不破坏旧版本解析逻辑。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "## 6. 风险与控制"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "- 事件语义漂移（文档与实现不一致）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "  - 控制：先冻结事件字典，再实现；测试用例与字典一一映射。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "- 兼容性回归（历史消费者解析失败）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "  - 控制：只增字段不删旧语义，版本字段必填，灰度验证。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "- 事件风暴（高频节点导致负载异常）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "  - 控制：采样、节流、异步队列与大小限制。"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 100
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 54
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/2026-03-28_DigEino执行事件底座升级方案.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.21057869493961334
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  Api:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "    Port: \":20201\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "Status:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  Webhook:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    Enabled: false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    URL: \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"] # 兼容旧名；也支持 started/succeeded/failed/completed"
          },
          {

          },
          {

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 13,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  Store:"
          },

            "lineNumber": 15,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    Type: \"memory\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    MySQL:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "      Host: \"127.0.0.1\""
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "text": "      User: \"root\""
          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeEnd(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, output interface{}, err error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "\tstartTime, ok := sc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "\tlogger := sc.logger"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "\tvar nodeUsage *Usage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "\tif nodeType == \"chat_model\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "\t\tnodeUsage = extractUsageFromOutput(output)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "\t\tif nodeUsage != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "\t\t\tsc.CollectTokenUsage(nodeKey, nodeUsage)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "\tstatus := ExecutionStatus{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "\t\tType:          \"node_end\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "\t\tSchemaVersion: ExecutionEventSchemaV1,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "\t\tEventType:     string(EventTypeSucceeded),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "\t\tTimestamp:     time.Now().UnixMilli(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID:   sc.executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "\t\tNodeKey:       nodeKey,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "\t\tNodeID:        nodeKey,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "\t\tNodeType:      nodeType,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "\t\tAttempt:       1,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "\t\tSource:        defaultEventSource,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:        \"success\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:       sc.appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:     sc.requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "\t\tDataFlow:      sc.marshalDataFlow(nil, output),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "\t\tUsage:         nodeUsage,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "\tif ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "\t\t_ = time.Since(startTime)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Status = \"error\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "\t\tstatus.EventType = string(EventTypeFailed)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Error = err.Error()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "\tif logger != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "\t\toutputCount := 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "\t\tif status.DataFlow != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "\t\t\toutputCount = status.DataFlow.OutputCount"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\t\tlogger.OnNodeEndLog(nodeKey, nodeType, outputCount, err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "// OnComplete 执行完成"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnComplete(ctx context.Context, result *schema.Message, err error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 13,
            "line": 253
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 31,
            "line": 197
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.19740843772888184
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino 使用指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 1. 安装"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "## 2. 配置管理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "### 2.1 依赖结构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "配置主要包含两个部分："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "### 2.2 使用示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
On 04-09, Hermes and OpenClaw were compared, with PostRun Learning recommended for the DigFlow ecosystem; the appendix suggested platformizing in DigEino with Host interfaces. On 04-12, the focus shifts to a DigEino-first implementation, where learning is implemented in DigEino with a single trigger on execution terminal state, aligning with StatusStore, while DigFlow handles the Host interface.

- DigEino's codebase uses the library `github.com/originaleric/digeino`.
- The `status/status_store.go` file contains `AddStatus`, which sets the terminal state in both memory and MySQL paths.
- The `webhook/status_collector.go` file manages asynchronous status sinks for store and webhook, with `sendStatusAsync` triggering the store.
- The `learning` package has not yet been implemented. The document mentions an "observer extension" in ideas, but grep did not find an Observer implementation in Go; the 2026-03-28 idea doc indicates it's planned, though not fully implemented.

For suitability:
- **DigEino**: Suitable  event-driven execution, execution_id, and status history are aligned. PostRun learning as Host pattern avoids circular dependencies with DigFlow.
- **Future plugin platforms**: The Host/adapter split (RunContextProvider, MemorySink, SkillSink, AuditStore) is appropriate for any host implementing those interfaces.</details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2-fast)**_
