```json
{
  "name": "PostRun Learning 方案分析",
  "overview": "对 Hermes/OpenClaw 对比与 PostRun 自进化两份方案做适用性判断，并基于当前 DigEino 库形态（执行事件底座 + StatusCollector/StatusStore）给出可落地的分阶段开发与宿主接入方案。",
  "plan": "# PostRun 自进化方案适用性分析与 DigEino 开发方案\n\n## 一、两份方案在讲什么\n\n| 文档 | 核心结论 |\n|------|----------|\n| [2026-04-09_Hermes与OpenClaw对比及DigFlow自进化强化方案.md](docs/ideas/2026-04-09_Hermes与OpenClaw对比及DigFlow自进化强化方案.md) | 对比 Hermes（执行+学习并重）与 OpenClaw（偏编排）；建议用 **PostRun Learning Loop** 补齐「后置学习环」；附录提出 **DigEino 三层抽象**（策略核 / 宿主适配 / runtime）与 &#96;Host&#96; 契约伪代码。 |\n| [2026-04-12_DigEino优先_PostRun自进化Learning落地方案.md](docs/ideas/2026-04-12_DigEino优先_PostRun自进化Learning落地方案.md) | 将落地顺序从「先 DigFlow MVP 再下沉」调整为 **先在 DigEino 实现通用 learning 子系统**，DigFlow 仅实现 &#96;learning.Host&#96;；**终态触发在 DigEino 内单点收敛**（与 execution 终态、幂等键一致）。 |\n\n**二者关系**：04-12 是对 04-09 第九章「平台化路径」的 **执行顺序修正**（DigEino 优先），附录 A 的接口意图不变。\n\n---\n\n## 二、是否适合 DigEino？\n\n**结论：适合，且与现有架构一致。**\n\n依据：\n\n1. **DigEino 已是执行观测底座**（见 [2026-03-28_DigEino执行事件底座升级与使用说明.md](docs/updates/2026-03-28_DigEino执行事件底座升级与使用说明.md)）：统一 &#96;ExecutionStatus&#96;、&#96;NormalizeEventType()&#96;、&#96;DedupeKey()&#96;，[&#96;StatusCollector&#96;](webhook/status_collector.go) 异步队列写 store/webhook，**主链路已与非阻塞后置逻辑解耦**——PostRun 学习天然应挂在「终态已观测」之后，而不是塞进模型主循环。\n\n2. **终态落盘点明确**：[&#96;status/status_store.go&#96;](status/status_store.go) 中 &#96;AddStatus&#96; 在 &#96;isTerminalStatus&#96; 时写入 &#96;EndTime&#96; 与 completed/failed；[&#96;webhook/status_collector.go&#96;](webhook/status_collector.go) 的 &#96;executeSinkTask&#96; 在 store 写入路径上可视为「终态已持久化或已尝试」的一致挂点（具体选 &#96;sendStatusAsync&#96; 终态分支 vs &#96;executeSinkTask&#96; 成功回调需在实现时定一条**唯一主路径**，避免双触发）。\n\n3. **库边界正确**：DigEino **不持有** DigFlow 的治理表、Memory、Skill 业务实现；仅提供 **类型 + Worker + DecisionEngine + 可选 LLM 接口 + &#96;Host&#96; 注册 API**，符合 04-12 中「&#96;learning&#96; 包不得 import DigFlow」的约束。\n\n4. **缺口（需在实现中补齐）**：当前仓库 **尚无** &#96;learning&#96; 包与正式「终态后观察器」接口；文档中提到的 observer 扩展在 [ideas 方案](docs/ideas/2026-03-28_DigEino执行事件底座升级方案.md) 中描述过，但 **以可注册的 &#96;TerminalHook&#96; / &#96;LearningNotifier&#96; 形式落地即可**，不必强求历史命名。\n\n---\n\n## 三、是否适合「未来使用 DigEino 插件/嵌入的平台」？\n\n**结论：适合，前提是坚持 &#96;Host&#96;（宿主适配）模式。**\n\n- **可复用部分**：复盘决策链（规则门槛 + LLM 结构化 JSON）、异步队列、重试、幂等（&#96;execution_id&#96; + &#96;terminal_outcome&#96;）、审计生命周期（保存决策 → applied/failed/rollback）。\n- **必须宿主实现的部分**：&#96;RunContext&#96; 拼装（用户输入、助手输出、工具轨迹、是否纠偏）、长期记忆存储、Skill CRUD/patch、审计落库与 HTTP 查询/回滚 API。\n- **不同平台的差异**：无治理 Run 的纯 CLI、仅有 webhook 的轻量集成、或完整 DigFlow 治理——只要宿主能提供 &#96;Host&#96; 四个能力（与 04-09 附录 A 对齐），即可共用同一套 **DigEino learning 核心**。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart LR\n  subgraph digeino [DigEino_learning]\n    Enq[Enqueue_on_terminal]\n    W[Worker]\n    E[DecisionEngine]\n  end\n  subgraph host [宿主_A_B_C]\n    H[Host_impl]\n    Mem[Memory_impl]\n    Sk[Skill_impl]\n    Aud[Audit_impl]\n  end\n  Enq --\u003e W --\u003e E\n  W --\u003e H\n  H --\u003e Mem\n  H --\u003e Sk\n  H --\u003e Aud\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## 四、基于 DigEino 的详细开发方案\n\n### 4.1 包与文件结构（建议）\n\n在仓库根下新增 &#96;learning/&#96;（与 04-12 一致，可按需微调命名）：\n\n| 文件 | 职责 |\n|------|------|\n| &#96;types.go&#96; | &#96;LearningEvent&#96;、&#96;RunContext&#96;、&#96;ToolCallDigest&#96;、&#96;LearningDecision&#96;、&#96;MemoryAction&#96;、&#96;SkillAction&#96;（与 04-09 附录 A 对齐） |\n| &#96;config.go&#96; | &#96;enabled&#96;、&#96;min_tool_calls_for_skill&#96;、&#96;min_confidence&#96;、&#96;patch_first&#96;、nudge 间隔、重试；并入 [&#96;config/config.go&#96;](config/config.go) + [&#96;config/config.yaml&#96;](config/config.yaml) |\n| &#96;host.go&#96; | &#96;Host&#96; 接口（或拆分为 &#96;RunContextProvider&#96;、&#96;MemorySink&#96;、&#96;SkillSink&#96;、&#96;LearningAuditStore&#96;）；DigEino 仅持 &#96;interface&#96;，无默认 DB 实现 |\n| &#96;engine.go&#96; | &#96;DecisionEngine&#96;：规则预过滤 + 可选注入 &#96;LLMClient&#96;（仅接口，避免强依赖具体模型包） |\n| &#96;worker.go&#96; | &#96;Handle&#96; / &#96;Enqueue&#96;：拉上下文 → 决策 → 分阶段执行 memory/skill → 审计回调；内部 goroutine 池或 channel（MVP 可用有界队列 + worker） |\n| &#96;idempotency.go&#96; | 基于 &#96;execution_id&#96; + 终态类型的去重（内存 map + TTL 或委托 &#96;LearningAuditStore.Exists&#96;） |\n\n**测试**：&#96;learning/*_test.go&#96; 使用 fake &#96;Host&#96; / mock engine，不依赖 MySQL。\n\n### 4.2 唯一终态触发点（DigEino 内）\n\n- **原则**：与 04-12 一致——在 **写入 execution 终态** 的同一观测路径上触发一次 &#96;learning.Enqueue&#96;（或等价注册回调），以 **&#96;execution_id&#96; 为幂等键之一**。\n- **推荐实现位置**（二选一，评审时定稿）：\n  - **方案 A**：在 [&#96;StatusCollector&#96;](webhook/status_collector.go) 中，当 &#96;NormalizeEventType()&#96; 为 &#96;completed&#96;/&#96;failed&#96;（或与 &#96;isTerminalStatus&#96; 语义一致）且异步 sink 路径已处理该事件时调用 &#96;Enqueue&#96;（需保证无 store 时仍能 Enqueue，以便仅 webhook 的宿主也能触发，由 Host 决定能否拼出 &#96;RunContext&#96;）。\n  - **方案 B**：包装 &#96;StatusStoreInterface&#96;，在 &#96;AddStatus&#96; 成功且 &#96;isTerminalStatus&#96; 后调用 &#96;Enqueue&#96;（需注意 memory/mysql 两套实现都要一致）。\n- **禁止**：DigFlow 与 DigEino 各触发一次；通过幂等 + 单点注册避免。\n\n### 4.3 全局注册 API\n\n- &#96;learning.SetHost(h Host)&#96; 或 &#96;learning.Init(cfg, host)&#96;，未注册或 &#96;enabled: false&#96; 时为 **no-op**（与 04-12 阶段 0 一致）。\n- DigFlow 在自身 &#96;bootstrap&#96; 中注册真实 &#96;Host&#96;。\n\n### 4.4 分阶段落地（与两份文档阶段对齐）\n\n| 阶段 | DigEino | 宿主（DigFlow 为首） |\n|------|---------|----------------------|\n| 0 | 默认关闭；日志；&#96;Host&#96; 可空 | 空 Host / no-op |\n| 1 | Worker + Engine 产出决策，经 &#96;Host&#96; **仅写审计** | 实现 &#96;LearningAuditStore&#96; + 表 &#96;df_learning_decision&#96;；打通全链路 |\n| 2 | 执行 &#96;memory_actions&#96; | &#96;MemorySink&#96; → 现有 LongTermStore / Extractor |\n| 3 | 执行 &#96;skill_actions&#96;（patch 优先） | &#96;SkillSink&#96; → Create / UpdateSkill |\n| 4 | 可选 &#96;Metrics&#96; 回调（命中率、回滚率） | 监控、按 app 灰度 |\n\n### 4.5 配置归属（04-12 表格）\n\n- **行为开关与阈值**：以 DigEino &#96;config&#96; 为权威加载入口；DigFlow 若需覆盖可通过初始化时传入或环境变量映射。\n- **审计与业务数据**：留在宿主 DB，由 &#96;Host&#96; 写入。\n- **队列**：MVP 进程内队列 + 审计表幂等；跨进程持久化队列（Redis 等）列为后续增强。\n\n### 4.6 风险与缓解\n\n| 风险 | 缓解 |\n|------|------|\n| 上下文不完整（仅 webhook 终态） | &#96;RunContextProvider&#96; 在 Host 内用治理 Run 快照 + execution 履历拼装；DigEino 只传 &#96;LearningEvent&#96; + 能从 Status 拿到的字段 |\n| 循环依赖 | &#96;learning&#96; 仅依赖 DigEino 内部与标准库 + 自声明接口 |\n| 噪音写入 | 阶段 1 只审计；阶段 2+ 启用 &#96;min_tool_calls&#96;、&#96;min_confidence&#96;、人工审核开关（宿主侧） |\n| 双触发 | 单点 Enqueue + &#96;execution_id&#96; 幂等 |\n\n### 4.7 版本与协作\n\n- DigEino 发 **次版本**（如 v1.x+1）；DigFlow &#96;go get&#96; 升级并实现 &#96;Host&#96;。\n- API 评审重点：04-09 附录 B（异步、幂等、安全、治理、泛化）。\n\n---\n\n## 五、小结\n\n- **04-09** 提供产品与技术论据（Hermes 式后台学习 + 接口草案）；**04-12** 将实施主战场放到 **DigEino 源码库**，避免在业务仓库重复造轮子。\n- 该方向 **适合 DigEino**（已有事件与终态语义），也 **适合任意嵌入 DigEino 的宿主**（通过 &#96;Host&#96; 契约隔离记忆/技能/审计）。\n- 开发上按 **learning 包 → 单点终态 Enqueue → 分阶段 rollout** 推进即可与现有 [执行事件底座](docs/updates/2026-03-28_DigEino执行事件底座升级与使用说明.md) 自然衔接。\n",

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I need to create a learning package containing all files. Add LearningConfig to the Config struct in config.go with default values and include the YAML section. Hook into the status_collector to enqueue learning events after sendStatusAsync for terminal events.

Avoid import cycles by ensuring the learning package does not import webhook, while webhook can import learning. Define TerminalOutcome string type in the learning package for terminal events, which carry execution_id, app_name, request_id, and outcome (completed/failed). For enqueue from status_collector:
- Import github.com/originaleric/digeino/learning
- Call learning.Enqueue(learning.LearningEvent{...}) when terminal status is observed

The plan specifies a single trigger point, so enqueue once per sendStatusAsync when status is terminal, not per sink task, to ensure single firing upon event observation. The learning event should be enqueued in `sendStatusAsync` after the callback, but only when `shouldSendToAsyncSinks` returns true for terminal events. Since `shouldSendToAsyncSinks` always returns true for completed or failed events, the enqueue will happen consistently for these terminal statuses. This ensures one-time firing per event, not per sink task. Enqueueing learning events must be non-blocking to avoid blocking the main path. The sendStatusAsync function should handle terminal events even when the store is disabled, ensuring that async sinks are properly considered. When only a callback exists and no async sinks are present, the system should still process terminal events correctly. If terminal events always pass `shouldSendToAsyncSinks`, they proceed past the check. However, if the store is nil and webhook clients are empty, the system still compacts the status and attempts to enqueue a sink task for the store only if the store exists. For terminal events with no store and no webhooks, the code enters the block after `shouldSendToAsyncSinks` but skips enqueueing any tasks. Still, the learning event should be enqueued in this case to ensure proper handling of terminal events even without async sinks. When a terminal status is observed, enqueue a learning event via `learning.Enqueue` after the callback, ensuring it's non-blocking and independent of async sink execution. This should occur once per terminal event, regardless of whether async sinks are present or not. I need to add a helper function `isTerminalStatus` in the webhook package to check for terminal statuses, either by duplicating the logic from the status package or exporting the existing function. I'll also add a new method `notifyLearningIfTerminal` to the StatusCollector in status_collector.go that enqueues learning events when terminal statuses are detected. This should be placed right after the callback in sendStatusAsync, ensuring that learning events are enqueued once per terminal event, regardless of async sink presence. The enqueue operation must remain non-blocking and independent of async sink execution. Terminal events are always processed through `shouldSendToAsyncSinks`, which returns true for completed and failed statuses, ensuring consistent handling. Even if sampling occurs, terminal events aren't excluded from processing. Early returns due to `!shouldSendToAsyncSinks` do not affect terminal events since they always pass this check. Therefore, learning events are reliably enqueued once per terminal event regardless of sampling or async sink configuration. But learning events must fire even when only a callback is set and store/webhook are disabled. In this case, `shouldSendToAsyncSinks` returns true for terminal events, so we enter the block after compacting, and we attempt to enqueue tasks for store (which is nil) and webhook (which is empty). Even though no actual sink tasks are executed in such cases, the learning event should still be enqueued via the proposed hook after the callback to ensure consistency.

For idempotency: while typically one complete event is expected per execution, duplicate complete events may occur. To handle this, we use `execution_id` and `outcome` for deduplication purposes. The learning package requires implementation of several core components:
- types.go: Defines all necessary structs
- host.go: Implements Host interface combining optional split interfaces
- engine.go: Contains DefaultDecisionEngine with rule-based logic and optional LLM interface
- worker.go: Worker with queue management
- idempotency.go: Handles idempotency mechanisms

For LLM integration, an interface is defined in engine.go:
- LLMClient interface with EvaluateLearning method
- Engine uses this interface; if nil, it defaults to rule-only behavior

Rule-only MVP implementation:
- Skips skill actions when tool calls are below min_tool_calls_for_skill threshold
- Returns skip decision or applies rule-only logic when LLM client is absent Always produce a decision with empty actions for phase 1. For the MVP without LLM, return a deterministic "audit-only" decision with reason "no_llm_configured" or skip. The Host interface should combine RunContextProvider, MemorySink, SkillSink, and LearningAuditStore, with methods for getting run context and applying memory. Or split interfaces as in the doc. Single `Host` interface in host.go is simpler for SetHost.

- Host interface combines RunContextProvider, MemorySink, SkillSink, and LearningAuditStore
- Simplifies Host setup and avoids complex interface splitting
- Host methods include GetRunContext, MemoryExists, AddMemory, FindSimilarSkill, CreateSkill, PatchSkill, and SaveDecision The Host interface was initially a large combined interface, but it's better to split it into smaller, focused interfaces for clarity and maintainability. The suggested split includes:

- RunContextProvider interface with GetRunContext method
- MemorySink interface for memory-related operations
- SkillSink interface for skill-related operations
- LearningAuditStore interface for audit storage operations

This modular approach simplifies the Host interface and makes each component more manageable. The Host interface now combines these four interfaces, maintaining all required functionality while improving organization. The Host interface combines RunContextProvider, MemorySink, SkillSink, and LearningAuditStore into a single interface with all required methods. This design allows the Worker to access all necessary functionality through one interface, simplifying implementation for embedding applications. The Host interface can be implemented by the embedding application, and nil host values result in no-op behavior instead of requiring empty implementations. The Host interface includes methods for handling learning decisions, such as checking if a decision exists, saving decisions, and marking them as applied or failed. It also supports memory operations like checking existence and adding memory entries, as well as skill-related functions like finding similar skills. These methods enable the Host to manage learning events and decisions effectively within the system. - Splitting interfaces improves modularity and maintainability.
- The Host interface combines RunContextProvider, MemorySink, SkillSink, and LearningAuditStore.
- Each interface serves a specific purpose: RunContextProvider handles run context, MemorySink manages memory, SkillSink deals with skills, and LearningAuditStore stores audits.
- This modular design simplifies implementation and reduces complexity.
- The Host interface enables the Worker to access all required functionality through one unified interface.
- Nil host values result in no-op behavior instead of requiring empty implementations.
- Idempotency is handled via ExistsDecision on the host.
- A rollback mechanism for audit is optional and can be added later with RollbackLearning.</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Issues to fix:

1. Phase logic is incorrect - PhaseAuditOnly should only audit, PhaseMemory should apply memory only (no skill), PhaseSkill should apply both memory and skill.

```go
``` The execution phase logic needs correction: PhaseAuditOnly should only audit, PhaseMemory should apply memory only, and PhaseSkill should apply both memory and skill. The default case was incorrectly implemented and should be PhaseSkill which applies both memory and skill. Based on the plan table, Phase 1 corresponds to audit-only execution. - Phase 2 handles memory actions, and Phase 3 handles skill actions.
- PhaseAuditOnly saves decisions and marks them as applied without using memory or skill.
- PhaseMemory saves decisions, applies memory, and marks them as applied.
- PhaseSkill saves decisions, applies both memory and skill, and marks them as applied.
- The default case in the switch statement should be removed to avoid duplication of PhaseSkill logic.
- applySkill function needs simplification for patch operations. Idempotency bug: TryClaim is attempted first if duplicate, audit save may not run. However, if process crashes after TryClaim but before save, a duplicate host could retry. The correct order is to try Claim first, then check Audit.Existsif it exists, return. If TryClaim returns false but is the first attempt, it indicates a duplicate event within the same process.

If Audit.Exists fails with an error, the system may still proceed to avoid duplication. A conservative approach would be to proceed with deduplication only, rather than returning.

MarkFailed should be used when apply failsthis is skipped for MVP.

For workers, when rc is nil from the provider, minimalRunContext is usedthis is acceptable.</details></think>

## 已交付内容

### 1. `learning/` 包（[learning/types.go](learning/types.go)、[learning/host.go](learning/host.go)、[learning/engine.go](learning/engine.go)、[learning/worker.go](learning/worker.go)、[learning/idempotency.go](learning/idempotency.go)、[learning/config.go](learning/config.go)）
- **类型**：`LearningEvent`、`RunContext`、`LearningDecision`、记忆/技能动作、`TerminalOutcome`、`Phase`（审计 / +memory / +skill）。
- **宿主契约**：`RunContextProvider`、`MemorySink`、`SkillSink`、`LearningAuditStore` 聚合为 `Host`。
- **决策**：`DefaultDecisionEngine`（规则门槛 + 可选 `LLMClient`）；`MinToolCallsForSkill`、`MinConfidence`、`PatchFirst` 行为与方案一致。
- **Worker**：有界队列 + 单 goroutine 消费；`SetHost`、`SetEngine`、`SetConfigOverride`、`Init`；`Enqueue` 非阻塞。
- **幂等**：`LearningAuditStore.Exists` 优先，进程内 `memoryDeduper` 辅助去重。

### 2. 配置（[config/config.go](config/config.go)、[config/config.yaml](config/config.yaml)）
- 新增 `Learning` 段，**默认 `Enabled: false`**；含 `ExecutionPhase`、`Retry` 等。

### 3. 终态单点挂接（[webhook/status_collector.go](webhook/status_collector.go)）
- 在 `sendStatusAsync` 中，回调之后、`shouldSendToAsyncSinks` 之前：若 **`learning.Enabled()` 且 `status.Type == "complete"`**（即 `OnComplete` 的 run 级终态），调用 `learning.Enqueue`，避免与节点级失败混淆。

### 4. 测试（[learning/engine_test.go](learning/engine_test.go)、[learning/worker_test.go](learning/worker_test.go)）
- 规则门槛、低置信度降级、审计幂等、`TryClaim` 行为。

### 5. DigFlow 侧任务（本仓库无法完成）
- **需在 DigFlow 仓库** 实现 `learning.Host`（治理 Run、Memory/Skill、审计表与 HTTP）、`bootstrap` 里 `learning.Init(...)`，并升级 `digeino` 依赖。当前仅在 [learning/host.go](learning/host.go) 注释中说明对接方式。

---

**启用方式**：在 `config.yaml` 设 `Learning.Enabled: true`，并在进程启动时注册 `Host`；否则 `Enqueue` 会因 `Enabled()` 为 false 直接返回。

---

_**Agent (composer-2-fast)**_


在仓库根目录下按需执行（路径请换成你本机实际路径）：

```bash
cd "/Users/dig/Documents/文稿 - XinYe的MacBook Pro (5)/Projects/go-app/DigEino"
```

**1. 查看状态**

```bash
git status
git branch
```

**2. 暂存并提交（若有未提交改动）**

```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "feat(learning): PostRun Learning 模块与文档更新"
```

若 `git status` 显示无改动，可跳过 `add`/`commit`。

**3. 打附注标签 `v1.0.3.13`**

```bash
git tag -a v1.0.3.13 -m "v1.0.3.13"
```

若本地已有同名标签，需先删再建：

```bash
git tag -d v1.0.3.13
# 若曾推过远程标签：git push origin :refs/tags/v1.0.3.13
git tag -a v1.0.3.13 -m "v1.0.3.13"
```

**4. 推送到 GitHub（当前分支 + 标签）**

```bash
git push origin HEAD
git push origin v1.0.3.13
```

或一条推送当前分支与所有新标签：

```bash
git push origin HEAD --tags
```

**5. 核对远程**

```bash
git ls-remote --tags origin | grep v1.0.3.13
```

---

说明：`HEAD` 会推当前检出分支；若要指定分支，把 `HEAD` 换成分支名（例如 `main` 或 `master`）。首次在本机配置远程时可用 `git remote -v` 确认 `origin` 指向你的 GitHub 仓库。
